resources.string: Turn textbooks and ebooks into razor-sharp notes in seconds - built for learners who skim but still want mastery.
snapaie downloads an on-device model once (multi-GB Wi-Fi recommended). Then compression stays private and usable offline.
OCR runs on-device. Compressed results are saved locally. Cloud sync stays off until we ship it - subscriptions only unlock premium UX.
snapaie snaps book pages, strips filler, keeps knowledge - Gemma LiteRT offline.

Cut the fluff. Keep the knowledge. snapaie scans any page photo, OCRs it with ML Kit, then runs local Gemma (LiteRT) to deliver concise meaning, core ideas, author intent, student-friendly breakdowns, and flashcard-ready vocab. Subscribe for ad-light focus or unlock Pro for life.

- Works offline once the model is downloaded
- No chatbot gimmicks - built for textbooks and nonfiction
- Transparent compression score and estimated time saved
Paid plans remove banners. Rewarded placements may appear for bonuses. Billing handled by Google Play; ads personalized when allowed by consent.
